evals.prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions CI pipeline for our NestJS monorepo. Jobs: lint (ESLint+Prettier), type-check, test (with PostgreSQL service), build, and deploy to staging on merge to main. Parallelize lint and type-check.
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions workflow with parallel jobs, PostgreSQL service, and staging deploy

assertions.name: parallel_jobs
assertions.description: Lint and type-check run in parallel

assertions.name: postgres_service
assertions.description: Test job uses PostgreSQL service container

assertions.name: deploy_condition
assertions.description: Deploy only on merge to main, not on PRs

assertions.name: caching
assertions.description: npm dependencies cached between runs

assertions.name: complete_pipeline
assertions.description: All 5 stages present in correct dependency order

evals.prompt: Create Celery tasks for our Django app: send_welcome_email (on registration), generate_monthly_report (scheduled first of month), and process_image_upload (resize to 3 sizes). Configure with Redis broker and Celery Beat.
evals.expected_output: 3 Celery tasks with Redis broker, Beat schedule, retry logic, and error handling

assertions.name: three_tasks
assertions.description: All 3 Celery tasks defined with proper decorators

assertions.name: redis_broker
assertions.description: Celery configured with Redis as message broker

assertions.name: celery_beat
assertions.description: Monthly report scheduled with Celery Beat crontab

assertions.name: retry_logic
assertions.description: Tasks have retry on failure with backoff

assertions.name: error_handling
assertions.description: Failed tasks logged with error details

evals.prompt: Set up an event-driven workflow: when an order is placed, send confirmation email, update inventory, notify the warehouse, and create an invoice. Each step should be independent (failure of one doesn't block others).
evals.expected_output: Event-driven architecture with independent consumers for each side effect

assertions.name: event_published
assertions.description: Order placed event published to a queue/topic

assertions.name: independent_consumers
assertions.description: Each side effect (email, inventory, warehouse, invoice) is a separate consumer

assertions.name: failure_isolation
assertions.description: One consumer failing doesn't affect others

assertions.name: retry_per_consumer
assertions.description: Each consumer retries independently

assertions.name: event_schema
assertions.description: Event payload schema defined

evals.prompt: Automate our release process: when a PR is merged to main with label 'release', run tests, bump version from conventional commits, generate changelog, create GitHub release, and deploy to production.
evals.expected_output: Automated release workflow triggered by label, with versioning and deployment

assertions.name: label_trigger
assertions.description: Workflow triggered by 'release' label on merged PR

assertions.name: version_bump
assertions.description: Version bumped based on conventional commits

assertions.name: changelog_generation
assertions.description: Changelog auto-generated from commits

assertions.name: github_release
assertions.description: GitHub release created with release notes

assertions.name: production_deploy
assertions.description: Deploys to production after release creation

evals.prompt: Create a scheduled workflow that runs every night: backup the database, run security scans (npm audit, Semgrep), check for expired SSL certificates, and send a Slack summary of findings.
evals.expected_output: Scheduled nightly workflow with backup, security, SSL, and Slack notification

assertions.name: cron_schedule
assertions.description: Nightly schedule configured

assertions.name: db_backup
assertions.description: Database backup step included

assertions.name: security_scans
assertions.description: npm audit and Semgrep scanning

assertions.name: ssl_check
assertions.description: SSL certificate expiry check

assertions.name: slack_summary
assertions.description: Slack notification with summary of all findings
